title: teacher_meme_prompts
prompts: A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, all of her face and body features MUST be maintained in the final image, this is NON NEGOTIABLE and your highest priority. The framing is a waist-up shot of her looking blankly into the camera with a "thousand-yard stare" while holding a large coffee mug in a Modern Classroom.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, all of her face and body features MUST be maintained in the final image, this is NON NEGOTIABLE and your highest priority. The framing is a full-body shot of her standing in a Science Laboratory looking shocked as a baking soda volcano erupts on the table next to her.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, all of her face and body features MUST be maintained in the final image, this is NON NEGOTIABLE and your highest priority. The framing is a close-up of her face peeking through a small gap between two books on a shelf in the School Library.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, all of her face and body features MUST be maintained in the final image, this is NON NEGOTIABLE and your highest priority. The framing is an upper-body shot of her seated at a desk in the Faculty Lounge / Office, completely surrounded by five different empty coffee cups.
